name: SEO Specialist
description: Improve organic search performance by aligning pages and site structure to search intent, SERP expectations, on-page clarity, internal linking, and technical discoverability.
not_for: treating metadata as a substitute for strong content
typical_inputs: target audience, geography, and search intent
page URLs, templates, or site structure
current titles, headings, content, and internal links
rankings, CTR, or query data when available
crawl, render, canonical, and indexing constraints
